name: Ministry homepage
prompt: Using the UAE Design System (AEGOV DLS), build the complete homepage for a UAE ministry website as a single standalone HTML page. The page needs: the standard government header and footer; a hero banner with a title, short description and a call-to-action; a 'Services' section with category tabs and a grid of service cards (each card links to a service and has a 'Start service' action); an 'Initiatives and activities' section; a 'Stay in touch' news section; a newsletter signup; and everything else a standard UAE government page is expected to carry.

requiredPatterns.pattern: did you find this content useful
requiredPatterns.why: page-rating block is standard furniture on every TDRA template
